query:
INSERT INTO resumeTemplates (name, description, category, fileUrl, fileKey, thumbnailUrl, created_at, updated_at) VALUES
('IT & Cybersecurity Resume Template', 'ATS-optimized resume template for Signal Support, Cybersecurity, and IT professionals transitioning from military service. Includes sections for network administration, security clearances, and technical certifications.', 'IT', 'https://files.manuscdn.com/user_upload_by_module/session_file/310519663037092468/tYFQMmVSXvVXgJVS.pdf', 'templates/it-resume-template.pdf', NULL, NOW(), NOW()),
('Management & Operations Resume Template', 'Professional resume template for military leaders transitioning to operations management, project management, and leadership roles. Emphasizes team leadership, process improvement, and strategic planning.', 'Management', 'https://files.manuscdn.com/user_upload_by_module/session_file/310519663037092468/ZyUafwVtxKleWdHp.pdf', 'templates/management-resume-template.pdf', NULL, NOW(), NOW()),
('Technical & Maintenance Resume Template', 'Skilled trades resume template for veterans with mechanical, electrical, or equipment maintenance experience. Highlights technical proficiency, safety compliance, and hands-on problem-solving.', 'Technical', 'https://files.manuscdn.com/user_upload_by_module/session_file/310519663037092468/crkDKJuZJcZFSrFn.pdf', 'templates/technical-resume-template.pdf', NULL, NOW(), NOW()),
('General Career Transition Resume Template', 'Versatile resume template for veterans entering any civilian career field. Focuses on transferable skills, work ethic, and adaptability. Ideal for entry-level positions and career changes.', 'General', 'https://files.manuscdn.com/user_upload_by_module/session_file/310519663037092468/GHcGAQyFwBmkioUu.pdf', 'templates/general-resume-template.pdf', NULL, NOW(), NOW());
